meaning: n.挖泥机,挖泥船,捞网v.挖掘,疏浚,捞取,撒在食物上
examples: They dredge the bay for gravel.
The papers keep trying to dredge up details of his past love life.
The visit was part the latest Twissup organised by Mark Dredge and Andy Mogg.
Welshman Bradley Dredge joined Italy's Alessandro Tadini and Wade Ormsby of Australia in second.
